name: Nat.succ_add
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n.succ + m = (n + m).succ

name: Nat.add_succ
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n + m.succ = (n + m).succ

name: Nat.add_comm
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n + m = m + n

name: Nat.add_assoc
statement: ∀ (n m k : ℕ), n + m + k = n + (m + k)

name: Nat.add_left_cancel
statement: ∀ {n m k : ℕ}, n + m = n + k → m = k

name: Nat.add_right_cancel
statement: ∀ {n m k : ℕ}, n + k = m + k → n = m

name: Nat.succ_eq_add_one
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), n.succ = n + 1

name: Nat.one_eq_succ_zero
statement: 1 = Nat.succ 0

name: Nat.succ_ne_zero
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), n.succ ≠ 0

name: Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos
statement: ∀ {n : ℕ}, 0 < n → n.pred.succ = n

name: Nat.mul_comm
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n * m = m * n

name: Nat.mul_assoc
statement: ∀ (n m k : ℕ), n * m * k = n * (m * k)

name: Nat.mul_add
statement: ∀ (k n m : ℕ), k * (n + m) = k * n + k * m

name: Nat.add_mul
statement: ∀ (n m k : ℕ), (n + m) * k = n * k + m * k

name: Nat.mul_left_cancel
statement: ∀ {k : ℕ}, 0 < k → ∀ {m n : ℕ}, k * m = k * n → m = n

name: Nat.mul_right_cancel
statement: ∀ {k : ℕ}, 0 < k → ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m * k = n * k → m = n

name: Nat.pow_add
statement: ∀ (b m n : ℕ), b ^ (m + n) = b ^ m * b ^ n

name: Nat.pow_mul
statement: ∀ (b m n : ℕ), b ^ (m * n) = (b ^ m) ^ n

name: Nat.pow_le_pow_right
statement: ∀ {x : ℕ}, 0 < x → ∀ {y z : ℕ}, y ≤ z → x ^ y ≤ x ^ z

name: Nat.succ_sub_one
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), n.succ - 1 = n

name: Nat.sub_add_cancel
statement: ∀ {n m : ℕ}, m ≤ n → n - m + m = n

name: Nat.add_sub_cancel
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n + m - m = n

name: Nat.add_sub_cancel_right
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n + m - n = m

name: Nat.sub_le
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n - m ≤ n

name: Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le
statement: ∀ {n m : ℕ}, n ≤ m → n - m = 0

name: Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
statement: ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m < n → 0 < n - m

name: tsub_add_cancel_of_le
statement: ∀ {a b : ℕ}, b ≤ a → a - b + b = a

name: Nat.sub_add_eq
statement: ∀ (n m k : ℕ), n - m + k = n + k - m

name: Nat.lt_of_sub_eq_succ
statement: ∀ {m n l : ℕ}, m - n = l.succ → n < m

name: Nat.le_refl
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), n ≤ n

name: Nat.le_of_lt
statement: ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m < n → m ≤ n

name: Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le
statement: ∀ {a b c : ℕ}, a < b → b ≤ c → a < c

name: Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
statement: ∀ {a b c : ℕ}, a ≤ b → b < c → a < c

name: Nat.le_trans
statement: ∀ {a b c : ℕ}, a ≤ b → b ≤ c → a ≤ c

name: Nat.le_antisymm
statement: ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m ≤ n → n ≤ m → m = n

name: Nat.lt_or_ge
statement: ∀ (m n : ℕ), m < n ∨ n ≤ m

name: Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ
statement: ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m.succ ≤ n.succ → m ≤ n

name: Nat.succ_le_succ
statement: ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m ≤ n → m.succ ≤ n.succ

name: Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le
statement: ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m < n ↔ m + 1 ≤ n

name: Nat.le_add_right
statement: ∀ (n k : ℕ), n ≤ n + k

name: Nat.le_add_left
statement: ∀ (n k : ℕ), n ≤ k + n

name: Nat.add_le_add_left
statement: ∀ {k : ℕ} (h : k ≤ l) (n : ℕ), n + k ≤ n + l

name: Nat.add_le_add_right
statement: ∀ {k : ℕ} (h : k ≤ l) (n : ℕ), k + n ≤ l + n

name: Nat.mul_le_mul_left
statement: ∀ (k : ℕ) {m n : ℕ}, m ≤ n → k * m ≤ k * n

name: Nat.lt_of_add_lt_add_left
statement: ∀ {k m n : ℕ}, k + m < k + n → m < n

name: Nat.dvd_refl
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), n ∣ n

name: Nat.dvd_trans
statement: ∀ {a b c : ℕ}, a ∣ b → b ∣ c → a ∣ c

name: Nat.dvd_add
statement: ∀ {k m n : ℕ}, k ∣ m → k ∣ n → k ∣ (m + n)

name: Nat.dvd_sub'
statement: ∀ {k m n : ℕ}, k ∣ m → k ∣ n → k ∣ (m - n)

name: Nat.dvd_mul_left
statement: ∀ (m n : ℕ), m ∣ n * m

name: Nat.dvd_mul_right
statement: ∀ (m n : ℕ), m ∣ m * n

name: Nat.mul_dvd_mul
statement: ∀ {m n k l : ℕ}, m ∣ k → n ∣ l → m * n ∣ k * l

name: Nat.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left
statement: ∀ {k : ℕ}, 0 < k → ∀ {m n : ℕ}, k * m ∣ k * n → m ∣ n

name: Nat.dvd_antisymm
statement: ∀ {m n : ℕ}, m ∣ n → n ∣ m → m = n

name: Nat.div_add_mod
statement: ∀ (m k : ℕ), k * (m / k) + m % k = m

name: Nat.mod_add_div
statement: ∀ (m k : ℕ), m % k + k * (m / k) = m

name: Nat.mod_def
statement: ∀ (m k : ℕ), m % k = m - k * (m / k)

name: Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left
statement: ∀ (a b c : ℕ), (a + b * c) % b = a % b

name: Nat.mul_mod_right
statement: ∀ (n m : ℕ), n * m % n = 0

name: Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero
statement: ∀ {m k : ℕ}, m ∣ k ↔ k % m = 0

name: Nat.gcd_comm
statement: ∀ (m n : ℕ), Nat.gcd m n = Nat.gcd n m

name: Nat.gcd_assoc
statement: ∀ (m n k : ℕ), Nat.gcd (Nat.gcd m n) k = Nat.gcd m (Nat.gcd n k)

name: Nat.gcd_zero_right
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), Nat.gcd n 0 = n

name: Nat.gcd_self
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), Nat.gcd n n = n

name: Nat.gcd_dvd_left
statement: ∀ (m n : ℕ), Nat.gcd m n ∣ m

name: Nat.gcd_dvd_right
statement: ∀ (m n : ℕ), Nat.gcd m n ∣ n

name: Nat.dvd_gcd
statement: ∀ {k m n : ℕ}, k ∣ m → k ∣ n → k ∣ Nat.gcd m n

name: Nat.Coprime.mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd
statement: ∀ {k m n : ℕ}, Nat.Coprime k m → k ∣ n → m ∣ n → k * m ∣ n

name: Nat.factorial_zero
statement: Nat.factorial 0 = 1

name: Nat.factorial_succ
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), Nat.factorial (n + 1) = (n + 1) * Nat.factorial n

name: Nat.factorial_pos
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < Nat.factorial n

name: Nat.choose_zero_right
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), Nat.choose n 0 = 1

name: Nat.choose_self
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), Nat.choose n n = 1

name: Nat.choose_succ_succ
statement: ∀ (n k : ℕ), Nat.choose (n+1) (k+1) = Nat.choose n k + Nat.choose n (k+1)

name: Nat.choose_symm
statement: ∀ {n k : ℕ}, k ≤ n → Nat.choose n k = Nat.choose n (n - k)

name: Int.add_comm
statement: ∀ (a b : ℤ), a + b = b + a

name: Int.add_assoc
statement: ∀ (a b c : ℤ), a + b + c = a + (b + c)

name: Int.mul_comm
statement: ∀ (a b : ℤ), a * b = b * a

name: Int.mul_assoc
statement: ∀ (a b c : ℤ), a * b * c = a * (b * c)

name: Int.mul_add
statement: ∀ (a b c : ℤ), a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c

name: Int.add_left_cancel
statement: ∀ {a b c : ℤ}, a + b = a + c → b = c

name: Int.emod_emod_of_dvd
statement: ∀ {n : ℤ} (m : ℤ) {k : ℤ}, k ∣ m → n % m % k = n % k

name: Int.add_mul_emod_self_left
statement: ∀ (a b c : ℤ), (a + b * c) % b = a % b

name: add_comm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [AddCommMonoid α] (a b : α), a + b = b + a

name: mul_comm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [CommMonoid α] (a b : α), a * b = b * a

name: add_assoc
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [AddSemigroup α] (a b c : α), a + b + c = a + (b + c)

name: mul_assoc
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Semigroup α] (a b c : α), a * b * c = a * (b * c)

name: mul_add
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Distrib α] (a b c : α), a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c

name: add_mul
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Distrib α] (a b c : α), (a + b) * c = a * c + b * c

name: sub_eq_add_neg
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [AddGroup α] (a b : α), a - b = a + (-b)

name: neg_add_cancel
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [AddGroup α] (a : α), -a + a = 0

name: mul_inv_cancel
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [GroupWithZero α] {a : α}, a ≠ 0 → a * a⁻¹ = 1

name: inv_mul_cancel
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [GroupWithZero α] {a : α}, a ≠ 0 → a⁻¹ * a = 1

name: div_self
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [GroupWithZero α] {a : α}, a ≠ 0 → a / a = 1

name: mul_div_cancel₀
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [GroupWithZero α] (a : α) {b : α}, b ≠ 0 → a * b / b = a

name: div_add_div_same
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Field α] (a b : α) {c : α}, c ≠ 0 → a / c + b / c = (a + b) / c

name: sq_nonneg
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrderedSemiring α] (a : α), 0 ≤ a ^ 2

name: sq_abs
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrderedRing α] (a : α), |a| ^ 2 = a ^ 2

name: sq_eq_sq'
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrderedRing α] {a b : α}, -b < a → a < b → a ^ 2 < b ^ 2

name: mul_self_nonneg
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrderedRing α] (a : α), 0 ≤ a * a

name: add_sq
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [CommRing α] (a b : α), (a + b) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + 2 * a * b + b ^ 2

name: sub_sq
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [CommRing α] (a b : α), (a - b) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 - 2 * a * b + b ^ 2

name: sq_sub_sq
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [CommRing α] (a b : α), a ^ 2 - b ^ 2 = (a + b) * (a - b)

name: abs_le
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrderedAddCommGroup α] {a b : α}, |a| ≤ b ↔ -b ≤ a ∧ a ≤ b

name: abs_sub_abs_le_abs_sub
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrderedAddCommGroup α] (a b : α), |a| - |b| ≤ |a - b|

name: pow_add
statement: ∀ {M : Type*} [Monoid M] (a : M) (m n : ℕ), a ^ (m + n) = a ^ m * a ^ n

name: pow_mul
statement: ∀ {M : Type*} [Monoid M] (a : M) (m n : ℕ), a ^ (m * n) = (a ^ m) ^ n

name: pow_succ
statement: ∀ {M : Type*} [Monoid M] (a : M) (n : ℕ), a ^ (n + 1) = a ^ n * a

name: pow_zero
statement: ∀ {M : Type*} [Monoid M] (a : M), a ^ 0 = 1

name: le_max_left
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrder α] (a b : α), a ≤ max a b

name: le_max_right
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrder α] (a b : α), b ≤ max a b

name: min_le_left
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrder α] (a b : α), min a b ≤ a

name: min_le_right
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrder α] (a b : α), min a b ≤ b

name: And.intro
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, a → b → a ∧ b

name: And.left
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, a ∧ b → a

name: And.right
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, a ∧ b → b

name: And.comm
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, a ∧ b ↔ b ∧ a

name: And.assoc
statement: ∀ {a b c : Prop}, (a ∧ b) ∧ c ↔ a ∧ (b ∧ c)

name: Or.inl
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, a → a ∨ b

name: Or.inr
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, b → a ∨ b

name: Or.elim
statement: ∀ {a b c : Prop}, a ∨ b → (a → c) → (b → c) → c

name: Or.comm
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, a ∨ b ↔ b ∨ a

name: not_not
statement: ∀ {a : Prop} [Decidable a], ¬¬a ↔ a

name: not_and_or
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, ¬(a ∧ b) ↔ ¬a ∨ ¬b

name: not_or
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, ¬(a ∨ b) ↔ ¬a ∧ ¬b

name: Iff.intro
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, (a → b) → (b → a) → (a ↔ b)

name: Iff.mp
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, (a ↔ b) → a → b

name: Iff.mpr
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, (a ↔ b) → b → a

name: Classical.em
statement: ∀ (p : Prop), p ∨ ¬p

name: Classical.byContradiction
statement: ∀ {p : Prop}, (¬p → False) → p

name: absurd
statement: ∀ {a b : Prop}, a → ¬a → b

name: not_lt
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrder α] {a b : α}, ¬a < b ↔ b ≤ a

name: not_le
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [LinearOrder α] {a b : α}, ¬a ≤ b ↔ b < a

name: lt_or_eq_of_le
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [PartialOrder α] {a b : α}, a ≤ b → a < b ∨ a = b

name: Decidable.not_imp_self
statement: ∀ {a : Prop} [Decidable a], (¬a → a) → a

name: ite_eq_iff
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {p : Prop} [Decidable p] {a b c : α}, (if p then a else b) = c ↔ p ∧ a = c ∨ ¬p ∧ b = c

name: Exists.intro
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {p : α → Prop} (w : α), p w → ∃ x, p x

name: exists_prop
statement: ∀ {p q : Prop}, (∃ _ : p, q) ↔ p ∧ q

name: forall_congr'
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {p q : α → Prop}, (∀ a, p a ↔ q a) → ((∀ a, p a) ↔ ∀ a, q a)

name: not_exists
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {p : α → Prop}, (¬∃ x, p x) ↔ ∀ x, ¬p x

name: not_forall
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {p : α → Prop} [Decidable (∀ x, p x)], (¬∀ x, p x) ↔ ∃ x, ¬p x

name: Eq.symm
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {a b : α}, a = b → b = a

name: Eq.trans
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {a b c : α}, a = b → b = c → a = c

name: congrArg
statement: ∀ {α β : Sort*} {a b : α} (f : α → β), a = b → f a = f b

name: congrFun
statement: ∀ {α : Sort*} {β : α → Sort*} {f g : ∀ x, β x}, f = g → ∀ a, f a = g a

name: ne_of_gt
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Preorder α] {a b : α}, a > b → a ≠ b

name: Set.mem_union
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {a : α} {s t : Set α}, a ∈ s ∪ t ↔ a ∈ s ∨ a ∈ t

name: Set.mem_inter_iff
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {a : α} {s t : Set α}, a ∈ s ∩ t ↔ a ∈ s ∧ a ∈ t

name: Set.mem_compl_iff
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {s : Set α} {a : α}, a ∈ sᶜ ↔ a ∉ s

name: Set.subset_def
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {s t : Set α}, s ⊆ t ↔ ∀ x, x ∈ s → x ∈ t

name: Set.Subset.antisymm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {s t : Set α}, s ⊆ t → t ⊆ s → s = t

name: Set.union_comm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s t : Set α), s ∪ t = t ∪ s

name: Set.inter_comm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s t : Set α), s ∩ t = t ∩ s

name: Set.empty_union
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s : Set α), ∅ ∪ s = s

name: Set.union_empty
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s : Set α), s ∪ ∅ = s

name: Set.inter_univ
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s : Set α), s ∩ Set.univ = s

name: Set.univ_inter
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s : Set α), Set.univ ∩ s = s

name: Set.compl_compl
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s : Set α), sᶜᶜ = s

name: Set.compl_union
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s t : Set α), (s ∪ t)ᶜ = sᶜ ∩ tᶜ

name: Set.compl_inter
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (s t : Set α), (s ∩ t)ᶜ = sᶜ ∪ tᶜ

name: Function.comp_id
statement: ∀ {α β : Sort*} (f : α → β), f ∘ id = f

name: Function.id_comp
statement: ∀ {α β : Sort*} (f : α → β), id ∘ f = f

name: Function.comp_assoc
statement: ∀ {α β γ δ : Sort*} (f : γ → δ) (g : β → γ) (h : α → β), (f ∘ g) ∘ h = f ∘ (g ∘ h)

name: Function.Injective.comp
statement: ∀ {α β γ : Sort*} {g : β → γ} {f : α → β}, Function.Injective g → Function.Injective f → Function.Injective (g ∘ f)

name: Function.Surjective.comp
statement: ∀ {α β γ : Sort*} {g : β → γ} {f : α → β}, Function.Surjective g → Function.Surjective f → Function.Surjective (g ∘ f)

name: Function.Bijective.injective
statement: ∀ {α β : Sort*} {f : α → β}, Function.Bijective f → Function.Injective f

name: Function.Bijective.surjective
statement: ∀ {α β : Sort*} {f : α → β}, Function.Bijective f → Function.Surjective f

name: Function.Injective.eq_iff
statement: ∀ {α β : Sort*} {f : α → β}, Function.Injective f → ∀ {a b}, f a = f b ↔ a = b

name: List.length_nil
statement: ∀ {α : Type*}, ([] : List α).length = 0

name: List.length_cons
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (a : α) (l : List α), (a :: l).length = l.length + 1

name: List.length_append
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (l₁ l₂ : List α), (l₁ ++ l₂).length = l₁.length + l₂.length

name: List.length_map
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} (f : α → β) (l : List α), (l.map f).length = l.length

name: List.length_reverse
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (l : List α), l.reverse.length = l.length

name: List.append_nil
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (l : List α), l ++ [] = l

name: List.nil_append
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (l : List α), [] ++ l = l

name: List.append_assoc
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (l₁ l₂ l₃ : List α), l₁ ++ l₂ ++ l₃ = l₁ ++ (l₂ ++ l₃)

name: List.map_nil
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} (f : α → β), List.map f [] = []

name: List.map_cons
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} (f : α → β) (a : α) (l : List α), List.map f (a :: l) = f a :: List.map f l

name: List.map_map
statement: ∀ {α β γ : Type*} (g : β → γ) (f : α → β) (l : List α), List.map g (List.map f l) = List.map (g ∘ f) l

name: List.map_id
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (l : List α), List.map id l = l

name: List.reverse_reverse
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (l : List α), l.reverse.reverse = l

name: List.mem_cons
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {a b : α} {l : List α}, a ∈ b :: l ↔ a = b ∨ a ∈ l

name: List.mem_append
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {a : α} {l₁ l₂ : List α}, a ∈ l₁ ++ l₂ ↔ a ∈ l₁ ∨ a ∈ l₂

name: List.filter_nil
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} (p : α → Bool), List.filter p [] = []

name: Finset.sum_empty
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {f : α → β}, (∅ : Finset α).sum f = 0

name: Finset.sum_cons
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {s : Finset α} {a : α} {f : α → β}, a ∉ s → (Finset.cons a s (by assumption)).sum f = f a + s.sum f

name: Finset.sum_range_zero
statement: ∀ {β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {f : ℕ → β}, (Finset.range 0).sum f = 0

name: Finset.sum_range_succ
statement: ∀ {β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {f : ℕ → β} {n : ℕ}, (Finset.range (n+1)).sum f = (Finset.range n).sum f + f n

name: Finset.sum_range_one
statement: ∀ {β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {f : ℕ → β}, (Finset.range 1).sum f = f 0

name: Finset.sum_add_sum_compl
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {s : Finset α} {t : Finset α} {f : α → β}, s ⊆ t → s.sum f + (t \ s).sum f = t.sum f

name: Finset.sum_comm
statement: ∀ {α β γ : Type*} [AddCommMonoid γ] {s : Finset α} {t : Finset β} {f : α → β → γ}, s.sum (fun a => t.sum (f a)) = t.sum (fun b => s.sum (fun a => f a b))

name: Finset.sum_congr
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {s t : Finset α} {f g : α → β}, s = t → (∀ x ∈ t, f x = g x) → s.sum f = t.sum g

name: Finset.sum_const
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] {s : Finset α} (c : β), s.sum (fun _ => c) = s.card • c

name: Finset.sum_le_sum
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} {s : Finset α} {f g : α → ℕ}, (∀ x ∈ s, f x ≤ g x) → s.sum f ≤ s.sum g

name: Finset.card_range
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), (Finset.range n).card = n

name: Finset.card_empty
statement: ∀ {α : Type*}, (∅ : Finset α).card = 0

name: Finset.mem_range
statement: ∀ {n k : ℕ}, k ∈ Finset.range n ↔ k < n

name: Finset.not_mem_range_self
statement: ∀ {n : ℕ}, n ∉ Finset.range n

name: Finset.prod_range_succ
statement: ∀ {β : Type*} [CommMonoid β] {f : ℕ → β} {n : ℕ}, (Finset.range (n+1)).prod f = (Finset.range n).prod f * f n

name: Finset.sum_ite_eq'
statement: ∀ {α β : Type*} [DecidableEq α] [AddCommMonoid β] (s : Finset α) (a : α) (f : α → β), s.sum (fun x => if x = a then f x else 0) = if a ∈ s then f a else 0

name: Finset.sum_geometric_two_add_one
statement: ∀ {n : ℕ}, (Finset.range n).sum (fun k => 2 ^ k) = 2 ^ n - 1

name: Finset.card_union_add_card_inter
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (s t : Finset α), (s ∪ t).card + (s ∩ t).card = s.card + t.card

name: mul_one
statement: ∀ {M : Type*} [MulOneClass M] (a : M), a * 1 = a

name: one_mul
statement: ∀ {M : Type*} [MulOneClass M] (a : M), 1 * a = a

name: inv_mul_cancel
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] (a : G), a⁻¹ * a = 1

name: mul_inv_cancel
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] (a : G), a * a⁻¹ = 1

name: mul_left_cancel
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] {a b c : G}, a * b = a * c → b = c

name: mul_right_cancel
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] {a b c : G}, b * a = c * a → b = c

name: inv_inv
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] (a : G), a⁻¹⁻¹ = a

name: mul_inv_rev
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] (a b : G), (a * b)⁻¹ = b⁻¹ * a⁻¹

name: inv_eq_of_mul_eq_one_left
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] {a b : G}, a * b = 1 → a = b⁻¹

name: Subgroup.mem_carrier
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] {H : Subgroup G} {x : G}, x ∈ H.carrier ↔ x ∈ H

name: Subgroup.one_mem
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] (H : Subgroup G), (1 : G) ∈ H

name: Subgroup.mul_mem
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] {H : Subgroup G} {x y : G}, x ∈ H → y ∈ H → x * y ∈ H

name: Subgroup.inv_mem
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Group G] {H : Subgroup G} {x : G}, x ∈ H → x⁻¹ ∈ H

name: MonoidHom.map_one
statement: ∀ {M N : Type*} [MulOneClass M] [MulOneClass N] (f : M →* N), f 1 = 1

name: MonoidHom.map_mul
statement: ∀ {M N : Type*} [MulOneClass M] [MulOneClass N] (f : M →* N) (a b : M), f (a * b) = f a * f b

name: MonoidHom.map_inv
statement: ∀ {G H : Type*} [Group G] [Group H] (f : G →* H) (a : G), f a⁻¹ = (f a)⁻¹

name: pow_add
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Monoid G] (a : G) (m n : ℕ), a ^ (m + n) = a ^ m * a ^ n

name: pow_zero
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Monoid G] (a : G), a ^ 0 = 1

name: pow_succ
statement: ∀ {G : Type*} [Monoid G] (a : G) (n : ℕ), a ^ (n + 1) = a ^ n * a

name: RingHom.map_zero
statement: ∀ {R S : Type*} [Semiring R] [Semiring S] (f : R →+* S), f 0 = 0

name: RingHom.map_one
statement: ∀ {R S : Type*} [Semiring R] [Semiring S] (f : R →+* S), f 1 = 1

name: RingHom.map_add
statement: ∀ {R S : Type*} [Semiring R] [Semiring S] (f : R →+* S) (a b : R), f (a + b) = f a + f b

name: RingHom.map_mul
statement: ∀ {R S : Type*} [Semiring R] [Semiring S] (f : R →+* S) (a b : R), f (a * b) = f a * f b

name: Ideal.mem_bot
statement: ∀ {R : Type*} [Semiring R] {x : R}, x ∈ (⊥ : Ideal R) ↔ x = 0

name: Ideal.mem_top
statement: ∀ {R : Type*} [Semiring R] {x : R}, x ∈ (⊤ : Ideal R)

name: Polynomial.eval_zero
statement: ∀ {R : Type*} [Semiring R] (p : Polynomial R), Polynomial.eval 0 p = p.coeff 0

name: Polynomial.eval_add
statement: ∀ {R : Type*} [Semiring R] (p q : Polynomial R) (x : R), (p + q).eval x = p.eval x + q.eval x

name: Polynomial.eval_mul
statement: ∀ {R : Type*} [CommSemiring R] (p q : Polynomial R) (x : R), (p * q).eval x = p.eval x * q.eval x

name: isOpen_univ
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X], IsOpen (Set.univ : Set X)

name: isOpen_empty
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X], IsOpen (∅ : Set X)

name: IsOpen.inter
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {s t : Set X}, IsOpen s → IsOpen t → IsOpen (s ∩ t)

name: isOpen_sUnion
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {S : Set (Set X)}, (∀ s ∈ S, IsOpen s) → IsOpen (⋃₀ S)

name: isClosed_compl_iff
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {s : Set X}, IsClosed sᶜ ↔ IsOpen s

name: Continuous.comp
statement: ∀ {X Y Z : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] [TopologicalSpace Y] [TopologicalSpace Z] {g : Y → Z} {f : X → Y}, Continuous g → Continuous f → Continuous (g ∘ f)

name: continuous_id
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X], Continuous (id : X → X)

name: continuous_const
statement: ∀ {X Y : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] [TopologicalSpace Y] {y : Y}, Continuous (fun _ : X => y)

name: IsCompact.finite_subcover
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {s : Set X} {ι : Type*} {U : ι → Set X}, IsCompact s → (∀ i, IsOpen (U i)) → s ⊆ ⋃ i, U i → ∃ t : Finset ι, s ⊆ ⋃ i ∈ t, U i

name: IsConnected.union
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {s t : Set X}, IsConnected s → IsConnected t → (s ∩ t).Nonempty → IsConnected (s ∪ t)

name: Filter.Tendsto.add
statement: ∀ {f g : ℝ → ℝ} {x a b : ℝ}, Filter.Tendsto f (nhds x) (nhds a) → Filter.Tendsto g (nhds x) (nhds b) → Filter.Tendsto (f + g) (nhds x) (nhds (a + b))

name: Filter.Tendsto.mul
statement: ∀ {f g : ℝ → ℝ} {x a b : ℝ}, Filter.Tendsto f (nhds x) (nhds a) → Filter.Tendsto g (nhds x) (nhds b) → Filter.Tendsto (f * g) (nhds x) (nhds (a * b))

name: Filter.Tendsto.const_mul
statement: ∀ {f : ℝ → ℝ} {x a c : ℝ}, Filter.Tendsto f (nhds x) (nhds a) → Filter.Tendsto (fun y => c * f y) (nhds x) (nhds (c * a))

name: continuousAt_id
statement: ∀ {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {x : X}, ContinuousAt id x

name: ContinuousAt.add
statement: ∀ {f g : ℝ → ℝ} {x : ℝ}, ContinuousAt f x → ContinuousAt g x → ContinuousAt (f + g) x

name: ContinuousAt.mul
statement: ∀ {f g : ℝ → ℝ} {x : ℝ}, ContinuousAt f x → ContinuousAt g x → ContinuousAt (f * g) x

name: HasDerivAt.add
statement: ∀ {f g : ℝ → ℝ} {f' g' x : ℝ}, HasDerivAt f f' x → HasDerivAt g g' x → HasDerivAt (f + g) (f' + g') x

name: HasDerivAt.mul
statement: ∀ {f g : ℝ → ℝ} {f' g' x : ℝ}, HasDerivAt f f' x → HasDerivAt g g' x → HasDerivAt (fun y => f y * g y) (f' * g x + f x * g') x

name: HasDerivAt.const_mul
statement: ∀ {f : ℝ → ℝ} {f' c x : ℝ}, HasDerivAt f f' x → HasDerivAt (fun y => c * f y) (c * f') x

name: hasDerivAt_id
statement: ∀ (x : ℝ), HasDerivAt id 1 x

name: hasDerivAt_const
statement: ∀ (x c : ℝ), HasDerivAt (fun _ => c) 0 x

name: hasDerivAt_pow
statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ), HasDerivAt (fun y => y ^ n) (↑n * x ^ (n - 1)) x

name: MeanValueTheorem
statement: ∀ {f : ℝ → ℝ} {a b : ℝ}, a < b → ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc a b) → (∀ x ∈ Set.Ioo a b, DifferentiableAt ℝ f x) → ∃ c ∈ Set.Ioo a b, deriv f c = (f b - f a) / (b - a)

name: MonotonOn.deriv_nonneg
statement: ∀ {f : ℝ → ℝ} {s : Set ℝ}, MonotonOn f s → ∀ x ∈ interior s, 0 ≤ deriv f x

name: LinearMap.map_zero
statement: ∀ {R M N : Type*} [Semiring R] [AddCommMonoid M] [AddCommMonoid N] [Module R M] [Module R N] (f : M →ₗ[R] N), f 0 = 0

name: LinearMap.map_add
statement: ∀ {R M N : Type*} [Semiring R] [AddCommMonoid M] [AddCommMonoid N] [Module R M] [Module R N] (f : M →ₗ[R] N) (x y : M), f (x + y) = f x + f y

name: LinearMap.map_smul
statement: ∀ {R M N : Type*} [Semiring R] [AddCommMonoid M] [AddCommMonoid N] [Module R M] [Module R N] (f : M →ₗ[R] N) (c : R) (x : M), f (c • x) = c • f x

name: Submodule.zero_mem
statement: ∀ {R M : Type*} [Semiring R] [AddCommMonoid M] [Module R M] (p : Submodule R M), (0 : M) ∈ p

name: Submodule.add_mem
statement: ∀ {R M : Type*} [Semiring R] [AddCommMonoid M] [Module R M] {p : Submodule R M} {x y : M}, x ∈ p → y ∈ p → x + y ∈ p

name: LinearMap.ker_eq_bot
statement: ∀ {R M N : Type*} [Ring R] [AddCommGroup M] [AddCommGroup N] [Module R M] [Module R N] {f : M →ₗ[R] N}, LinearMap.ker f = ⊥ ↔ Function.Injective f

name: LinearMap.range_eq_top
statement: ∀ {R M N : Type*} [Ring R] [AddCommGroup M] [AddCommGroup N] [Module R M] [Module R N] {f : M →ₗ[R] N}, LinearMap.range f = ⊤ ↔ Function.Surjective f

name: Matrix.mul_assoc
statement: ∀ {m n p q : Type*} [Fintype n] [Fintype p] [Semiring α] (A : Matrix m n α) (B : Matrix n p α) (C : Matrix p q α), A * B * C = A * (B * C)

name: Matrix.one_mul
statement: ∀ {n : Type*} [Fintype n] [DecidableEq n] [Semiring α] (A : Matrix n n α), 1 * A = A

name: Matrix.det_mul
statement: ∀ {n : Type*} [Fintype n] [DecidableEq n] [CommRing α] (A B : Matrix n n α), (A * B).det = A.det * B.det

name: Matrix.det_one
statement: ∀ {n : Type*} [Fintype n] [DecidableEq n] [CommRing α], (1 : Matrix n n α).det = 1

name: Matrix.det_transpose
statement: ∀ {n : Type*} [Fintype n] [DecidableEq n] [CommRing α] (A : Matrix n n α), A.transpose.det = A.det

name: le_refl
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Preorder α] (a : α), a ≤ a

name: le_trans
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Preorder α] {a b c : α}, a ≤ b → b ≤ c → a ≤ c

name: le_antisymm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [PartialOrder α] {a b : α}, a ≤ b → b ≤ a → a = b

name: lt_irrefl
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Preorder α] (a : α), ¬a < a

name: lt_trans
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [Preorder α] {a b c : α}, a < b → b < c → a < c

name: Monotone.comp
statement: ∀ {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ] {g : β → γ} {f : α → β}, Monotone g → Monotone f → Monotone (g ∘ f)

name: StrictMono.comp
statement: ∀ {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ] {g : β → γ} {f : α → β}, StrictMono g → StrictMono f → StrictMono (g ∘ f)

name: sup_comm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [SemilatticeSup α] (a b : α), a ⊔ b = b ⊔ a

name: inf_comm
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [SemilatticeInf α] (a b : α), a ⊓ b = b ⊓ a

name: le_sup_left
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [SemilatticeSup α] {a b : α}, a ≤ a ⊔ b

name: le_sup_right
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [SemilatticeSup α] {a b : α}, b ≤ a ⊔ b

name: inf_le_left
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [SemilatticeInf α] {a b : α}, a ⊓ b ≤ a

name: inf_le_right
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [SemilatticeInf α] {a b : α}, a ⊓ b ≤ b

name: MeasureTheory.measure_empty
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α] {μ : MeasureTheory.Measure α}, μ ∅ = 0

name: MeasureTheory.measure_mono
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α] {μ : MeasureTheory.Measure α} {s t : Set α}, s ⊆ t → μ s ≤ μ t

name: MeasureTheory.measure_union_le
statement: ∀ {α : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α] {μ : MeasureTheory.Measure α} (s t : Set α), μ (s ∪ t) ≤ μ s + μ t
